Boxes will be placed in the Operations Department area in order that you may pack up all of your belongings.  You will be responsible for moving your personal belongings to your new desk and the IT staff will be responsible for moving your phone and computer equipment to your new desk.  In order to identify your newly allocated desks, sheets with the names of the above-captioned individuals will be attached to the desks.

Please see me if you have any questions or concerns.
